Package io.forja.components.feedbackAndStatus.fxProgressBar

Class FxProgressBar.Builder

java.lang.Object
io.forja.builder.FxComponentBuilder<FxProgressBar,FxProgressBar.Builder>
io.forja.components.feedbackAndStatus.fxProgressBar.FxProgressBar.Builder
Enclosing class:
FxProgressBar
public static class FxProgressBar.Builder extends FxComponentBuilder<FxProgressBar,FxProgressBar.Builder>
Fluent builder for constructing an FxProgressBar.

Defaults:

  • progress — 0
  • indeterminate — false
  • variant — SemanticVariant.ACCENT

    • build

      public FxProgressBar build()
      Description copied from class: FxComponentBuilder
      Constructs and returns the configured component.

      Implementations must call FxComponentBuilder.applyBase(Control) on the constructed control before returning it.

      Specified by:
      build in class FxComponentBuilder<FxProgressBar,FxProgressBar.Builder>
      Returns:
      the built component
